programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Corvette Summer
programme.desc: High school graduate Kenneth W Dantley Junior and Vanessa a hooker-in-training try to track down his custom-made newly-stolen Corvette

programme.title: License to Drive
programme.desc: A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite flunking his drivers test

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A woman hires Kimble to drive her daughter and herself to California The young girl has a rabbit with her that had been a test subject in a research study and is infected with meningitis

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: While in the dangerous jungles of Ecuador Mike takes desperate measures to save the life of his very ill infant godson

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike travels undercover to the Caribbean Coast on a secret mission for the United States Government

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: An ace-pilot colonel and former instructor of Gen Savage joins the 918th but he may be too independent which costs lives

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia assures Barnabas a letter exposing him will be turned over to the authorities if she or Maggie turn up dead but Willie is unconvinced that her ruse was successful Meanwhile Maggie is comforted by Sarahs doll

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: While attempting to warn Maggie Willie is shot by police and subsequently hospitalized so Barnabas pays Maggie a visit to ensure her memory hasnt returned

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Painter Jack Craig gains himself a wealthy patron when he sells a morbid painting He soon finds that in order to please his patron he must continue to paint pictures of death - and this leads him down a murderous path

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While searching for a serial killer Nick Knight discovers a chance to end his vampire curse While Schanke tracks down leads in the human world Nick learns that the murder may be the work of the man who made him a vampire 700 years ago

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While The Professor tries to round up enough metal to make an anchor for a raft with an SOS message attached to it Gilligan reels in a World War II underwater mine from the lagoon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that they are all wanted for questioning in a murder that took place right before they left Hawaii

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A multi-talented photographer obtains the McCoys permission to take pictures of their farm but Luke becomes jealous when he seems to be focusing most of his attention on Kate

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa has Luke prepared for the worst when it is learned that Kates mother is coming for a visit but everyone is surprised when she arrives and repeatedly chides Kate for being insufficiently attentive to Lukes needs

programme.title: Smart 521
programme.desc: Smart 521

programme.title: Smart 523
programme.desc: Smart 523

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 1

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed rescues a millionaires granddaughter from a runaway horse

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Nearby war games inspire Hogan to replace some of the blank German ammunition with live ammo using Klinks birthday as a diversion

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan nixes a mission to destroy a synthetic fuel plant because the caper is too riskybut he is overruled - and forced to participate in the scheme by the ploys mastermind a strong-willed determined female scientist

programme.title: Mchale 402
programme.desc: Mchale 402

programme.title: Mchale 403
programme.desc: Mchale 403

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 222
programme.desc: Hercules 222

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Research continues on the scarecrow probe Boone starts learning Taelon to interpret its messages The device meanwhile absorbs a scientist Rayna

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens continue to expand their operations Sparked by random footage shot by a reporter Harrisons the team descend on the previously abandoned town of Beeton where they find a bustling community that in theory should not exist

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A scientist from Alec Hollands past is employed by a businessman who claims he wants to build a recycling plant near the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Will starts dating a girl from a carnival Her boss who is manipulating the young carnies wants to sacrifice Will to the forces of darkness in a scam to keep his young work force in line

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: As the Alphans are planning to explore the planet Ariel a missile attaches itself to the en route Eagle Upon returning to Alpha the missile gives the Alphans a lunar atmosphere But the joy at the possibility of making a new world out of the Moon is short lived as the moon does not enter orbit around the planet or its sun and Alpha faces destruction from the newly acquired lunar air

programme.title: Cyber Tracker
programme.desc: This is the future A secret service agent is framed by his own and becomes the target of the seemingly indestructible Cyborg-Executioners

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller goes undercover as a draft dodger to investigate an AWOL Marines murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon works to stop a munitions magnate who is supplying arms to neo-nazis She reawakens memories of his late wife who was murdered by Hitler

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: On an April 4 1968 Martin Luther King was assassinated in Memphis Tennesee With riots erupting all over the United States the Los Angeles Police Department braces for worse case scenarios such as rioting and bomb threats Friday and Gannon are assigned to the command post and monitor the situation from there and wait for the first sign of trouble However as the weekend progresses Friday notes that Los Angeles is quieter than normal and that many of the people are doing their best to remember that Dr King stood for peace

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: At an off-season motel a woman turns to Kimble for help with her son who is an unusually bright but troubled child Kimble helps the boy so much that when he has to run from the local sheriff the boy follows after imperiling them both

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The arrival of an old friend of Victoria and Toms causes trouble in the Valley due to the mans claim on a plot of land which has been earmarked as the location of a new dam

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is forced to join an outlaw gang lead by the Ghost of the Cimarron He is the only person who can clear Cheyenne with the law who was framed for reward money Over time Cheyenne comes to realize why the man is respected

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A comet wipes out most of life on Earth leaving two Valley Girls fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The evil Arcanes stepdaughter helps the muck-monster defeat the madman before he can unleash his genetic mutations Based on DC Comics characters

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: Hellbound
programme.desc: Two Chicago cops Chuck Norris Calvin Levels investigate a murder until they encounter an ancient demon

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Luke Theriault v. Justin Sander

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Dia Grant v. Julius Huhs.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Milan Paleš v. Mohamed Didouh

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Thompson v. Davion Peterson

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ken Tran v. Troy Sheridan

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jarod Milko v. Paapa Inkumsah.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Filip Verlinden v. Ibrahim El Boustati

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Alex Martinez HK39

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring John Woo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Brett Caswell v. Josh Bangert

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: 2017 - Terry Brazier v. David Round

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick and Scooter are stranded on an alien prehistoric planet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill has Braxis create a weapon that can induce stars to go nova roasting all their planets and the Guardians must stop him before he can use it on the Sun
